title: Build Main Application Shell and Sidebar Navigation
description: Create the main application layout with fixed sidebar navigation and main content area. Sidebar includes icons/labels for: Kanban (default), Agent Monitor, Terminal, Settings. Implement router (React Router or TanStack Router) for view switching. Add notification bell with badge counter.
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar fixed at 64px width with expand-on-hover to 200px
Navigation items: Kanban, Agents, Terminal, Settings with Lucide icons
Active route highlighted with portal-green indicator
Main content area fills remaining width with proper scrolling
React Router configured with routes for each view
Notification bell in header shows unread count badge
Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd/Ctrl + 1-4 switch between views
agent_output: Main app shell with sidebar navigation implemented
